content: Ingestion pipeline failures: non-idempotent append-only writes duplicate records on retry/backfill (fix: natural key + upsert); watermark bugs double-count when watermark advances before commit or overlaps windows; poison records cause head-of-line blocking and unbounded retry storms (fix: bounded retries + dead-letter table + idempotent consumers); silent data loss when failures discarded unrecorded. Sources: Fivetran, Prefect, Unstructured.io, Redpanda, DLQ pattern literature.
